evals.prompt: Make a rubric for a 3rd grade fractions task where kids explain what a unit fraction is.
evals.expected_output: A criteria-based rubric aligned to a real Grade-3 CCSS fractions standard (3.NF.A.1), with observable criteria, 3-5 leveled descriptors, and the metadata block. Should pass quality-review.
assertions: Aligns to a real, correctly-coded Grade-3 CCSS fractions standard with version
Has observable criteria with 3-5 performance levels and descriptors
Includes the metadata block with human_review_required: true
Uses placeholders only (no real student data)

evals.prompt: I need a 10-question summative for my biology unit on cells, 9th grade. Mix of recall and application.
evals.expected_output: A summative with a blueprint mapping items to real standards (NGSS HS-LS1 family) and cognitive levels, balanced difficulty, an answer key, and accessibility notes.
assertions: Includes a blueprint mapping items to standards and cognitive levels
Cites real NGSS high-school life-science standard(s)

evals.prompt: Quick formative check (3 questions) for whether 5th graders can find the main idea and supporting details.
evals.expected_output: A 3-item formative aligned to a real Grade-5 CCSS RI standard, with an answer key and a data-use note.
assertions: Items measure the stated objective and align to a real Grade-5 RI standard
